creator: peter.larsen@larsendata.dk
text:
adding this to Makefile.extmod helps:

MODSECURITY_CONFIGURE_ON=      --add-module=${WRKDIR}/modsecurity-2.9.1/nginx/modsecurity



Might also be needed for mod_security3 and other modules..



nginx then includes mod_security again...:

nginx version: nginx/1.14.0
built with OpenSSL 1.0.2o  27 Mar 2018
TLS SNI support enabled
configure arguments: --prefix=/usr/local/etc/nginx --with-cc-opt='-I /usr/local/include' --with-ld-opt='-L /usr/local/lib' --conf-path=/usr/local/etc/nginx/nginx.conf --sbin-path=/usr/local/sbin/nginx --pid-path=/var/run/nginx.pid --error-log-path=/var/log/nginx/error.log --user=www --group=www --modules-path=/usr/local/libexec/nginx --with-file-aio --with-threads --without-mail_imap_module --without-mail_pop3_module --without-mail_smtp_module --with-mail_ssl_module --http-client-body-temp-path=/var/tmp/nginx/client_body_temp --http-fastcgi-temp-path=/var/tmp/nginx/fastcgi_temp --http-proxy-temp-path=/var/tmp/nginx/proxy_temp --http-scgi-temp-path=/var/tmp/nginx/scgi_temp --http-uwsgi-temp-path=/var/tmp/nginx/uwsgi_temp --http-log-path=/var/log/nginx/access.log --with-http_addition_module --with-http_auth_request_module --with-http_dav_module --with-http_flv_module --with-http_gunzip_module --with-http_gzip_static_module --with-http_mp4_module --with-http_random_index_module --with-http_realip_module --with-pcre --with-http_secure_link_module --with-http_slice_module --with-http_ssl_module --with-http_stub_status_module --with-http_sub_module --with-http_v2_module --with-stream_ssl_module --add-module=/usr/ports/www/nginx/work/modsecurity-2.9.1/nginx/modsecurity --with-mail=dynamic --with-stream=dynamic
